metadata.description: Vehicle system to component parts mappings from DGT ITI syllabi

systems.description: Internal combustion engine — converts fuel energy to mechanical motion. Covers cylinder block, valve train, and rotating assembly.

parts.name: Piston
parts.role: Converts combustion pressure to linear motion

parts.name: Piston Ring
parts.role: Seals combustion chamber, controls oil

parts.name: Connecting Rod
parts.role: Transfers piston motion to crankshaft

parts.name: Crankshaft
parts.role: Converts reciprocating to rotary motion

parts.name: Camshaft
parts.role: Actuates intake/exhaust valves via lobes

parts.name: Cylinder Head
parts.role: Seals top of cylinder, houses valves

parts.name: Cylinder Head Gasket
parts.role: Seals joint between block and head

parts.name: Valve
parts.role: Controls gas flow in/out of cylinder

parts.name: Valve Guide
parts.role: Guides valve stem for alignment

parts.name: Valve Seat
parts.role: Sealing surface for valve face

parts.name: Valve Spring
parts.role: Returns valve to closed position

parts.name: Rocker Arm
parts.role: Transfers cam motion to valve

parts.name: Pushrod
parts.role: Transfers lifter motion to rocker arm (OHV engines)

parts.name: Timing Chain
parts.role: Synchronizes crankshaft and camshaft rotation

parts.name: Tensioner
parts.role: Maintains timing chain/belt tension

parts.name: Flywheel
parts.role: Stores rotational energy, smooths power delivery

systems.description: Stores, delivers, and meters fuel to the engine. Covers carburetion, fuel injection (MPFI/CRDI), and fuel supply.

parts.name: Fuel Pump
parts.role: Delivers fuel from tank to engine

parts.name: Fuel Filter
parts.role: Removes contaminants from fuel

parts.name: Fuel Injector
parts.role: Sprays metered fuel into combustion chamber

parts.name: Carburetor
parts.role: Mixes fuel with air (older engines)

parts.name: Fuel Tank
parts.role: Stores fuel

parts.name: Fuel Line
parts.role: Routes fuel between components

parts.name: Air Filter
parts.role: Filters intake air to engine

parts.name: Throttle Body
parts.role: Controls airflow to engine

parts.name: Fuel Pressure Regulator
parts.role: Maintains constant fuel rail pressure

parts.name: Injection Pump
parts.role: Pressurizes and times diesel fuel delivery

systems.description: Maintains engine operating temperature by transferring excess heat. Covers liquid cooling and air cooling components.

parts.name: Radiator
parts.role: Dissipates heat from coolant to air

parts.name: Thermostat
parts.role: Regulates coolant flow based on temperature

parts.name: Water Pump
parts.role: Circulates coolant through engine and radiator

parts.name: Coolant
parts.role: Heat transfer fluid

parts.name: Fan Belt
parts.role: Drives water pump and fan from crankshaft

parts.name: Cooling Fan
parts.role: Draws air through radiator

parts.name: Radiator Cap
parts.role: Maintains cooling system pressure

parts.name: Radiator Hose
parts.role: Routes coolant between engine and radiator

parts.name: Expansion Tank
parts.role: Stores excess coolant during expansion

parts.name: Temperature Sensor
parts.role: Sends temperature reading to ECU/gauge

systems.description: Reduces friction and wear between moving parts by supplying pressurized oil. Covers oil pump, filtration, and galleries.

parts.name: Oil Pump
parts.role: Pressurizes and circulates engine oil

parts.name: Oil Filter
parts.role: Removes contaminants from engine oil

parts.name: Oil Pressure Sensor
parts.role: Monitors oil pressure for warning system

parts.name: Oil Pan
parts.role: Stores engine oil at bottom of engine

parts.name: Oil Cooler
parts.role: Cools engine oil in heavy-duty applications

parts.name: PCV Valve
parts.role: Vents crankcase gases back to intake

systems.description: Decelerates and stops the vehicle. Covers disc brakes, drum brakes, hydraulic actuation, and ABS.

parts.name: Brake Pad
parts.role: Friction material pressed against disc rotor

parts.name: Brake Shoe
parts.role: Friction material pressed against drum

parts.name: Brake Disc
parts.role: Rotating disc gripped by pads to slow wheel

parts.name: Brake Drum
parts.role: Rotating drum pressed by shoes to slow wheel

parts.name: Master Cylinder
parts.role: Converts pedal force to hydraulic pressure

parts.name: Brake Caliper
parts.role: Clamps pads against disc via hydraulic piston

parts.name: Wheel Cylinder
parts.role: Pushes shoes against drum via hydraulic pressure

parts.name: Brake Line
parts.role: Routes hydraulic fluid to wheel brakes

parts.name: Brake Fluid
parts.role: Transmits hydraulic force in brake system

parts.name: Brake Booster
parts.role: Amplifies brake pedal force using vacuum

parts.name: ABS Module
parts.role: Prevents wheel lock-up during hard braking

parts.name: ABS Sensor
parts.role: Monitors wheel rotation speed for ABS

systems.description: Absorbs road shocks and maintains tire contact with road surface. Covers springs, dampers, and linkages.

parts.name: Shock Absorber
parts.role: Dampens spring oscillation, controls body motion

parts.name: Coil Spring
parts.role: Absorbs road impact, supports vehicle weight

parts.name: Leaf Spring
parts.role: Spring and locating member (trucks/rear axle)

parts.name: Ball Joint
parts.role: Pivot point connecting control arm to knuckle

parts.name: Control Arm
parts.role: Links wheel assembly to vehicle frame

parts.name: Stabilizer Bar
parts.role: Reduces body roll in corners

parts.name: Bushing
parts.role: Isolates vibration at mounting points

parts.name: Strut Mount
parts.role: Connects strut to body, allows rotation

systems.description: Controls vehicle direction. Covers manual steering, power steering (hydraulic and electric), and wheel alignment.

parts.name: Steering Rack
parts.role: Converts rotary steering input to linear wheel motion

parts.name: Tie Rod
parts.role: Links steering rack to steering knuckle

parts.name: Power Steering Pump
parts.role: Provides hydraulic pressure for power assist

parts.name: Power Steering Fluid
parts.role: Hydraulic medium for power steering

parts.name: Steering Column
parts.role: Connects steering wheel to steering gear

parts.name: Steering Knuckle
parts.role: Carries wheel hub, pivots for steering

parts.name: Steering Wheel
parts.role: Driver input device for direction control

systems.description: Transmits engine power to wheels with variable speed/torque ratios. Covers clutch, gearbox, propeller shaft, differential, and axles.

parts.name: Clutch Plate
parts.role: Friction disc that engages/disengages engine from gearbox

parts.name: Pressure Plate
parts.role: Clamps clutch disc against flywheel

parts.name: Release Bearing
parts.role: Disengages pressure plate when pedal pressed

parts.name: Gearbox
parts.role: Provides multiple gear ratios

parts.name: Propeller Shaft
parts.role: Transmits power from gearbox to differential

parts.name: Universal Joint
parts.role: Allows angle changes in propeller shaft

parts.name: Differential
parts.role: Splits power to wheels, allows speed difference in turns

parts.name: Axle Shaft
parts.role: Transmits power from differential to wheel

parts.name: CV Joint
parts.role: Allows power transmission at variable angles (FWD)

parts.name: Clutch Cable
parts.role: Mechanical linkage for clutch actuation

systems.description: Generates, stores, and distributes electrical power. Covers battery, charging, starting, ignition, and electronic control systems.

parts.name: Battery
parts.role: Stores electrical energy for starting and accessories

parts.name: Alternator
parts.role: Generates AC current, charges battery while running

parts.name: Starter Motor
parts.role: Cranks engine for starting

parts.name: Ignition Coil
parts.role: Steps up battery voltage for spark plug firing

parts.name: Spark Plug
parts.role: Ignites air-fuel mixture in cylinder

parts.name: Glow Plug
parts.role: Pre-heats combustion chamber for diesel cold start

parts.name: ECU
parts.role: Central computer managing engine operation

parts.name: Fuse
parts.role: Protects circuits from overcurrent

parts.name: Relay
parts.role: Electrically operated switch for high-current circuits

parts.name: Wiring Harness
parts.role: Bundled wiring connecting all electrical components

parts.name: Voltage Regulator
parts.role: Maintains stable charging voltage from alternator

systems.description: Routes exhaust gases out and reduces harmful emissions. Covers exhaust manifold, catalytic converter, EGR, and sensors.

parts.name: Exhaust Manifold
parts.role: Collects exhaust gases from cylinders

parts.name: Catalytic Converter
parts.role: Reduces harmful exhaust emissions (CO, HC, NOx)

parts.name: Silencer
parts.role: Reduces exhaust noise

parts.name: Exhaust Pipe
parts.role: Routes exhaust gases from manifold to tailpipe

parts.name: Oxygen Sensor
parts.role: Monitors exhaust oxygen content for ECU fuel control

parts.name: EGR Valve
parts.role: Recirculates exhaust gas to reduce NOx emissions

parts.name: DPF
parts.role: Traps soot particles from diesel exhaust

parts.name: Turbocharger
parts.role: Uses exhaust energy to compress intake air

parts.name: Intake Manifold
parts.role: Distributes air/fuel mixture to cylinders

systems.description: Vehicle lighting, signaling, comfort, and safety electronics. Covers lamps, wipers, power windows, instruments, and safety systems.

parts.name: Headlight
parts.role: Illuminates road ahead

parts.name: Tail Light
parts.role: Makes vehicle visible from rear

parts.name: Indicator Light
parts.role: Signals turning/lane change intention

parts.name: Horn
parts.role: Audible warning device

parts.name: Wiper Motor
parts.role: Drives wiper blade across windshield

parts.name: Wiper Blade
parts.role: Clears rain/debris from windshield

parts.name: Speedometer
parts.role: Displays vehicle speed

parts.name: Fuel Gauge
parts.role: Displays fuel tank level

parts.name: Temperature Gauge
parts.role: Displays engine coolant temperature

systems.description: Vehicle air conditioning and heating. Covers refrigeration cycle components and cabin air management.

parts.name: Compressor
parts.role: Compresses refrigerant gas to high pressure

parts.name: Condenser
parts.role: Cools and liquefies high-pressure refrigerant

parts.name: Evaporator
parts.role: Absorbs cabin heat as refrigerant evaporates

parts.name: Expansion Valve
parts.role: Meters refrigerant flow to evaporator

parts.name: Blower Motor
parts.role: Circulates air through evaporator into cabin

parts.name: Receiver Drier
parts.role: Stores refrigerant and removes moisture

parts.name: AC Compressor Clutch
parts.role: Engages/disengages compressor from engine

parts.name: Cabin Air Filter
parts.role: Filters air entering the cabin

systems.description: EV-specific powertrain and energy systems. Covers traction motor, battery pack, power electronics, and charging.

parts.name: Traction Motor
parts.role: Converts electrical energy to mechanical motion for propulsion

parts.name: High Voltage Battery
parts.role: Stores electrical energy for driving

parts.name: Motor Controller
parts.role: Controls motor speed and torque via power electronics

parts.name: BMS
parts.role: Monitors and balances battery cells, manages charging/discharging

parts.name: DC-DC Converter
parts.role: Steps down high voltage to 12V for vehicle accessories

parts.name: Onboard Charger
parts.role: Converts AC mains power to DC for battery charging

parts.name: Charging Port
parts.role: Physical connector for external charging

parts.name: Regenerative Braking Module
parts.role: Recovers kinetic energy during braking
